user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Nod Publishers. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-23 15:15 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
Date: 2024-02-14 10:20 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about migration architecture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 17:22 EST
Subject: Re: Re: migration architecture Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with migration architecture. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Nod Publishers
Date: 2024-01-22
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), David (Nod Publishers)

[00:01:15] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is migration architecture.

[00:08:00] David (Nod Publishers): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:11:00] David (Nod Publishers): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:19:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:21:00] David (Nod Publishers): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Nod Publishers: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around
